title: University of Southampton Delhi Offer Holder Event Overview & Welcome
text: Offer Holder event 19 July 3.30pm-7.00pm Event Status: Completed Date & Time: July 19, 2025 3:30 PM IST Location: International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India Recommended for: Students with an offer to study with us (and their families) Book now Discover University of Southampton Delhi for the August 2025 intake! If you are an offer holder, or are already committed to studying with us, this special event will prepare you for August. Join us from 3.30pm to 7.00pm. Experience a glimpse of life at University of Southampton Delhi, explore our facilities, meet members of our community, and get a sense of what it means to be part of a vibrant, globally connected learning environment. Don’t miss the chance to see where your learning journey could begin. We look forward to welcoming you! Visitor arrival and registration - 3:30 pm Enjoy some refreshments as you sign in at Reception and decide what sessions you would like to attend on campus. Academic faculty meet and greet - 3:30 pm - 4:00 pm Talk to the world-leading academics who will deliver programmes from August. These short informal and individual sessions are your chance to ask questions about the programme content, the quality of academic teaching, and a way to get to know your faculty before term starts. There is no need to book, but we would ask you to wait a few minutes if an academic is talking to another visitor when you arrive. Student support, finance and accommodation helpdesks - 3:30 pm - 4:00 pm A chance to talk our dedicated support staff about and get answers to any detailed questions you may have. You will find expert guidance here on anything related to admissions, placement and careers, the library, and the amazing experience that awaits students. Our finance team will be on hand if you still have a tuition fee deposit to pay or you wish to secure accommodation at the student hostel. University leadership formal welcome - 4:00 pm - 4:45 pm We invite you to a 40-minute session to hear university leaders from the India and the UK explain why University of Southampton Delhi is a true landmark for Higher Education in India. You will also discover the distinctive style of teaching and learning, world-class research and support for enterprise and start up business. To complete the session, we will showcase the amazing careers that alumni have embarked upon when they have graduated from a University of Southampton programme.
summary: This event for offer holders on July 19, 2025, in Gurugram, India, provides an overview of University of Southampton Delhi life, including initial registration, academic meet-and-greets, student support, and a formal university welcome.

title: Academic Taster Sessions and Faculty Engagement at Offer Holder Event
text: Academic taster sessions - 4:45 pm - 5:15 pm Take a 25 minute academic taster and experience the unique teaching style that makes University of Southampton a world-leader. Sessions are delivered by the same academic faculty members who will teach programmes when term starts in August 2025. Visitors can choose between ‘Behavioural Economics’ lead by Dr Chitrakalpa Sen (Head of Economics) and ‘Money Talks – Why Finance and Accounting Matter in every career’ lead by Dr Mohammed Anam Akhtar (Head of Business Education). Academic taster sessions - 5:15 pm - 5:45 pm Take a 25 minute academic taster and experience the unique teaching style that makes University of Southampton a world-leader. Sessions are delivered by the same academic faculty members who will teach programmes when term starts in August 2025. Visitors can choose between ‘Design Thinking’ lead by Dr Aparna Pasumarthy (Lecturer in Business) and ‘Human Machine Interaction’ lead by Dr Vaibhav Gandhi (Head of Computer Science). Academic faculty meet and greet - 4:45 pm - 7:00 pm Talk to the world-leading academics who will deliver programmes from August. These short informal and individual sessions are your chance to ask questions about the programme content, the quality of academic teaching, and a way to get to know your faculty before term starts. There is no need to book, but we would ask you to wait a few minutes if an academic is talking to another visitor when you arrive. Student support, finance and accommodation helpdesks - 4:45 pm - 7:00 pm A chance to talk our dedicated support staff about and get answers to any detailed questions you may have. You will find expert guidance here on anything related to admissions, placement and careers, the library, and the amazing experience that awaits students. Our finance team will be on hand if you still have a tuition fee deposit to pay or you wish to secure accommodation at the student hostel.
summary: Offer holders can attend academic taster sessions on Behavioural Economics, Money Talks, Design Thinking, and Human Machine Interaction, led by faculty including Dr. Chitrakalpa Sen and Dr. Vaibhav Gandhi, alongside continued opportunities for faculty and support staff interaction.
entities: Money Talks – Why Finance and Accounting Matter in every career

title: Campus Tours, Accommodation Visit, and Networking for Offer Holders
text: Guided campus tour - 5:45 pm - 6:15 pm Join a 25 minute guided tour of the campus. We will show you our purpose built learning and teaching rooms, the first floor library, break-out and collaborative spaces, computing, financial and technical laboratories and our Student Hub. And you will see the impressive shared facilities outside the main campus building such as food courts, the health suite, shuttle bus station and sports facilities Student hostel accommodation guided visit - 5:45 pm - 6:45 pm A 55 minute tour of our exclusive student accommodation hostel only 6km from campus. Hop on a free shuttlebus from campus and see what your daily journey will be like to your new ‘home from home’ in the peaceful Suncity residential community. You will see amazing room options, shared community spaces and dining facilities. We will bring you back to campus on the shuttlebus after the guided visit ends. Networking and High Tea - 6:15 pm - 7:00 pm A great mixer session with academic faculty, other offer holders and support staff. Reflect on the day, ask any last-minute questions and enjoy some refreshments before you leave the campus. Event closes - 7:00 pm Have a safe trip home! International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India
summary: The event concludes with guided tours of the campus facilities and student accommodation hostel in Suncity, followed by a networking high tea with faculty and staff at International Tech Park Gurgaon.
